meaning: adj.缇庨(鐑归オ)娉曠殑,鐑逛换瀛︾殑
examples: Paris is the gastronomic capital of the world.
She is sampling gastronomic delights along the Riviera.
They are even promoting the home of beer and dumplings as a gastronomic destination.
In fact, Gothenburg was named the 2012 Culinary Capital of Sweden, solidifying its gastronomic reputation.
Would the region that had experienced such gastronomic fame suddenly disappear from the food world's radar?
